/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -compatibility_version 2.0.0 -current_version 2.0.0 -o ../lib/libxcfun.2.dylib -install_name @rpath/libxcfun.2.dylib CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/XCFunctional.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/xcint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/aliases.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/apbec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/apbex.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/b97-1xc.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/b97-2xc.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/b97xc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/beckex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcfun.dir/functionals/blocx.cpp.o
